THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, MING $8,190.86 PRINCIPAL, $2,866.80 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,057.66, ATTORNEYS FEES AWARDED PER DECLARATION; COSTS PER COST BILL. INTEREST IS CALCULATED AT 10% LEGAL INTEREST PER ANNUM FROM 10-11-91 THROUGH 4-11-95.
